title: tauschia edulis
intro: Tauschia edulis, also known as California coltsfoot or mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tauschia edulis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Tauschia edulis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
